privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This site is a personal portfolio. I keep data collection to an absolute minimum — no tracking, no profiling, no selling of data.
privacy.s1_body: Page views are counted with Umami, a self-hosted, open-source analytics tool. Umami does not use cookies, does not collect personal data, and does not share anything with third parties. The data (page URL, referrer, browser language, screen size, country) is stored on my own server and used only to understand which content is useful.
privacy.s2_body: The contact form is protected by Cloudflare Turnstile. Turnstile runs a privacy-friendly challenge — it does not use fingerprinting or tracking cookies. Cloudflare may process your IP address and browser metadata on their servers to verify the challenge; see cloudflare.com/privacypolicy for details. The message you send (contact handle and text) is delivered to me via a server-side email and is not stored anywhere else.
privacy.s3_body: If you leave a comment on a post, your name, optional email address, and the comment text are stored in Sanity (a cloud-based content platform, servers in the EU/US). Your email is shown only as {'@'}handle — the full address is not displayed publicly. Comments may be moderated or removed at my discretion.
privacy.s4_body: I do not set any cookies. Cloudflare Turnstile may set a short-lived technical cookie as part of the challenge mechanism; it is cleared when the session ends.
privacy.s5_body: Under GDPR and equivalent laws you have the right to access, correct, or delete any personal data I hold. To exercise these rights, email me at {email}. I will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s6_body: If this policy changes materially, I will update the date at the top of this page.
